visual_description: A medium close-up shot focuses on a young man with a serious and concerned expression. He has dark, slightly messy hair with lighter highlights. He is wearing a black leather-style jacket over a red t-shirt and several layered silver chains around his neck. The background is dimly lit with a greenish hue, featuring what appears to be window blinds. The camera remains steady, keeping the man as the central focus of the frame. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. The audio consists of a series of sharp, metallic clanking and rattling sounds, as if a heavy chain or a set of keys is being shaken vigorously. The sounds are rhythmic and create a tense, slightly ominous atmosphere, suggesting a moment of unease or anticipation. There is no dialogue or background music, making the metallic clatter the central focus of the soundscape.
